tests.name: A3 Step Steer (ISO 7401, transient response)
tests.run: jq -e --arg sid A3 '[.breakdown[] | select(.sid==$sid) | .score] | add >= 9' icc-project/grade_report.json

tests.name: A1 ISO 3888-1 DLC (lateral handling)
tests.run: jq -e --arg sid A1 '[.breakdown[] | select(.sid==$sid) | .score] | add >= 10' icc-project/grade_report.json

tests.name: A4 Steady-State Circular (understeer characterization)
tests.run: jq -e --arg sid A4 '[.breakdown[] | select(.sid==$sid) | .score] | add >= 6' icc-project/grade_report.json

tests.name: A7 Brake-in-Turn (ESC integration — 핵심)
tests.run: jq -e --arg sid A7 '[.breakdown[] | select(.sid==$sid) | .score] | add >= 10' icc-project/grade_report.json

tests.name: B1 Straight-Line Braking (ABS efficiency)
tests.run: jq -e --arg sid B1 '[.breakdown[] | select(.sid==$sid) | .score] | add >= 6' icc-project/grade_report.json

tests.name: D1 DLC + 0.3g Brake (ICC integration — 핵심)
tests.run: jq -e --arg sid D1 '[.breakdown[] | select(.sid==$sid) | .score] | add >= 5' icc-project/grade_report.json
